problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Rhizobium. Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
